text:
1. Dependency to ESD sould better be user option.
        2. p5-GTK's search path is wrong.

Fix: 

Fix Makefile
How-To-Repeat: 
        cd /usr/ports/x11/enlightenment
        make install
        pkg_delete `make package-name`
        ldconfig -R /usr/local/lib
        make install
